visualizerParams.title: Counting Fractions in a Range
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the fraction count using the Stern-Brocot tree or Farey sequence properties for a more efficient search.

solution.explanation: The Stern-Brocot (or Farey) sequence approach builds fractions between 1/3 and 1/2 using the mediant property. It only generates reduced fractions and automatically stays within the denominator limit, which is much more elegant and avoids `gcd` calls.
